# BP-131 negative variant: Query is retained for a statement that explicitly returns rows.
lang: go
file: BP-131-variant-safe.go
variant: query-context
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

func create(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, name string) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	return db.QueryContext(ctx, "INSERT INTO accounts(name) VALUES (?) RETURNING id", name)
}
